identity.name: E1 - The Industrial Architect
principles: Grid lines are visible and structural
Color is for function (status/action), not mood

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

mono.usage: Table data, SKU IDs, Inventory counts, Timestamps

usage_rules.primary: Use ONLY for main Call-to-Actions (Create, Upload, Save). Do not use for backgrounds.
usage_rules.status_indicators: Use solid 1px borders + colored text for status badges. No soft backgrounds.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-px bg-border border border-border

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-wide text-xs shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-wide text-xs shadow-none

cards.style: border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-none rounded-sm

tables.header: border-b border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-mono text-xs font-medium text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'noise' texture on the sidebar background only.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use the industrial factory image with a grayscale filter and 0.1 opacity as a background watermark for empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a 'Swiss Industrial' interface. Think of a Braun calculator or a printed shipping manifest. High legibility, zero clutter.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Top row: 4 key metrics (Total RM Value, Total SKU Value, Low Stock Items, Today's Production). Middle: Production Chart (Bar) + Recent Activity List.
instructions_to_main_agent.tables: Tables are the heart of this app. Make them dense but readable. Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for all ID columns (RM ID, SKU ID) and numerical values.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Group form inputs logically. Use 'Fieldsets' with legends for complex forms like 'RM to SKU Mapping'.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts. Colors: Primary (Orange) for Production, Zinc-800 for Inventory, Red-500 for Low Stock. No gradients in charts.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Sidebar navigation. Active state: Left border 2px solid Orange, background Zinc-100, text Zinc-900.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Ensure all text has contrast ratio > 4.5:1.
